topic_label: Classical Machine Learning (Shared with DS, deeper focus)

concepts.title: Decision tree construction (Information Gain, Gini impurity)
concepts.hook: Understand splitting criteria and why different metrics rank features differently.

concepts.title: Tree depth and pruning strategies
concepts.hook: Manage model complexity; cost-complexity pruning is principled.

concepts.title: Random forest: bagging and OOB error
concepts.hook: Bootstrap aggregation reduces variance; OOB provides free validation.

concepts.title: Gradient boosting mechanics (loss, gradient, residuals)
concepts.hook: Sequential residual learning; why gradient boosting works.

concepts.title: LightGBM and XGBoost tuning
concepts.hook: Leaf-wise vs level-wise growth; learning rate, max depth, subsample tradeoffs.

concepts.title: SHAP and feature importance
concepts.hook: Explain predictions; distinguish feature importance from selection.

concepts.title: Perceptron and multi-layer perceptron (MLP)
concepts.hook: Single hidden layer universal approximator; deep networks reduce neurons needed.

concepts.title: Activation functions (ReLU, tanh, sigmoid, Swish)
concepts.hook: Nonlinearity enables learning complex functions; ReLU dominance due to computational efficiency.

concepts.title: Loss functions (MSE, cross-entropy, focal loss)
concepts.hook: Different losses suit different tasks; know why softmax + cross-entropy preferred over softmax + MSE.

concepts.title: Backpropagation and gradient computation
concepts.hook: Chain rule through layers; computational graph.

concepts.title: Initialization strategies (He, Xavier)
concepts.hook: Poor initialization causes vanishing/exploding gradients; variance of activations matters.

concepts.title: Learning rates and schedules (cosine annealing, warm restarts)
concepts.hook: Learning rate is most important hyperparameter; schedules improve convergence.

concepts.title: Optimization algorithms (SGD, Momentum, Adam, AdamW)
concepts.hook: SGD + momentum is still strong; Adam adaptive learning rates help with sparse gradients; AdamW decouples weight decay.

concepts.title: Gradient clipping and numerical stability
concepts.hook: Prevent exploding gradients; especially important in RNNs.

concepts.title: Dropout and batch normalization
concepts.hook: Dropout: stochastic regularization; BN: reduces internal covariate shift and acts as regularizer.

concepts.title: L1 and L2 regularization
concepts.hook: L2 penalizes all weights; L1 induces sparsity.

concepts.title: Early stopping
concepts.hook: Simple and effective; use validation set to detect overfitting.

concepts.title: Data augmentation
concepts.hook: Increases effective training set; task-specific (image rotation, text substitution).

concepts.title: Mixup and CutMix
concepts.hook: Novel augmentations; train on interpolated examples.

concepts.title: Label smoothing
concepts.hook: Soften targets; improves generalization and calibration.
